violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer is to be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026
Food observed stored on the floor in the kitchen, walk in cooler, and walk in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026
Pizza boxes observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026
The mixing bowl for the floor mixer was not in good repair, with deep dents in the bottom, impacting its ability to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: floor mixers table beneath grill shelves refrigerator cupboards including door tracks freezer. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026
The hand washing sink in the kitchen has an accumulation of food debris and soil residue. Plumbing fixtures must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026

The ceiling and ceiling vents above prep area in the kitchen an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

The fan covers in the walk in cooler and freezer have an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026
Kitchen wall is in poor repair, with cracked and missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2026

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the back prep area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024

Spinach was observed thawing in stagnant water in the sink. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. PIC turned on water at faucet during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024
Boxes of food were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024
Gaskets located on the walk-in cooler were observed not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024
The walls near dough pulling/prep area have an accumulation of food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2024

The wall tiles in stairway to upstairs area are in poor repair, with tiles observed cracked and/or missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

The ceiling in the dough preparation area is in poor repair. Inspector observed a large crack in the ceiling during inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024
The lights at the hood were not functioning during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2024
